parameters.name: send_notification
parameters.description: Send a push notification via ntfy.sh to the user's phone. Parameters: message (required, notification body text), title (optional short title), priority (optional 1-5, 3=default, 5=urgent with sound+vibration, 1=silent), tags (optional comma-separated emoji shortcuts like 'warning,fire' or 'heavy_check_mark'), click (optional URL that opens when tapping the notification), attach (optional URL to an image/file to attach), filename (optional custom filename for attachment).

value.title: ={{ $fromAI('title', 'Short notification title (optional)', 'string') }}
value.click: ={{ $fromAI('click', 'URL to open when tapping the notification (optional)', 'string') }}
value.attach: ={{ $fromAI('attach', 'URL of an image or file to attach (optional)', 'string') }}
